capabilities_used.evidence: 他高频围绕 FOMC 交易节奏发帖："GETTING READY FOR FOMC TOMORROW   RATE DECISION IS AT 2 PM ET"、"FOMC RATE DECISION WILL BE OUT TOMORROW AT 2 PM ET"、"JEROME POWELL SPEECH AT 2:30 IS WHAT’S IMPORT..."，并在 2024-12-18 强调 "S&P 500 FALLS 3% IN BIGGEST POST FOMC DROP SINCE MARCH 2020"。
他把大盘当作风险开关："FUTURES JUST OPENED   S&P 500 UP 0.3%"、"THE STOCK MARKET IS NOW ON TRACK FOR ITS WORST DAY IN ALMOST 3 YEARS"、"THE S&P 500 IS ON TRACK TO CLOSE AT A NEW ALL TIME RECORD HIGH"。

他持续用利率/央行流动性框架解释风险资产："BANK OF AMERICA SAYS THE FED IS DONE CUTTING RATES"、"BANK OF CANADA HAS JUST ENDED ITS QUANTITATIVE TIGHTENING PROGRAM AND IT JUST CUT INTEREST RATES BY 25 BPS"、"JEROME POWELL SAYS A RATE CUT COULD BE ON TABLE IN SEPTEMBER"。
他经常把极端上涨/极端叙事当作顶部或过热信号：2024-05-30 发 "IS THIS A TOP SIGNAL ?  $NVDA"；2025-05-30 发 "REGENCELL BIOSCIENCE... UP OVER 20,000% IN 2 MONTHS"；附图里也有 "1 USD = 1.43 CAD" 并配文 "THIS IS GETTING CRAZY NOW"。
他会顺着强趋势加大乐观表达："ALIBABA IS UP ANOTHER 7% IN 24 HOURS TRADING"、"ALIBABA IS NOW UP 30% OVER THE LAST WEEK"、"VICTORIA SECRET NOW UP ALMOST 100% IN 3 MONTHS & BOOM IT JUST HIT MY PRICE TARGET"。
他也会快速接受弱势趋势和基本面恶化："INTEL TO LAYOFF ANOTHER 16,500 EMPLOYEES"、"NIKE SHARES JUST HAD THEIR WORST DAY IN HISTORY"、"RIP  $TSLA"，以及 "THE BEARS WERE ALWAYS RIGHT" 这类顺势看空措辞。
他的内容高度聚焦高波动时段："CHINESE STOCK MARKET FUTURES HAVE BEEN HALTED TO THE UPSIDE DUE TO VOLATILITY"、"THE JAPANESE STOCK MARKET IS NOW DOWN 5% TODAY"、PATH 5 天跌近 40%、WMT 单日因拆股视觉上跌 60% 的截图。
虽然不是系统化风控表述，但他反复用暴跌案例提醒不要机械抄底："UI PATH IS SINCE DOWN 40% IN 2 DAYS"、"NVIDIA SHARES ARE CURRENTLY DOWN 11%... BIGGEST 1 DAY LOSS"、"NIKE SHARES JUST HAD THEIR WORST DAY IN HISTORY TODAY"。
他会把 ETF/机构通道当作行情催化之一，例："FIDELITY HAS JUST FILED FOR A SPOT ETHEREUM ETF"；但这不是他最核心、最重复的框架。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Headline Impulse Trading
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Trade directional moves off fresh political, legal, macro, earnings, or corporate headlines before the broader market fully reprices them.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 围绕政治、法律、宏观、财报、公司公告等最新头条做方向性交易，在市场完全重定价前抢先表达观点。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 大量推文以 "BREAKING" / "JUST IN" 开头，如 "US JUSTICE DEPARTMENT TO CHARGE BOEING WITH FRAUD"、"TRUMP SAYS IF CANADA IMPOSES RETALIATORY TARIFFS..."、"NVIDIA JUST REPORTED EARNINGS"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Sentiment Anecdote Extremes
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use absurd anecdotes, viral screenshots, vanity plates, or retail/social-media behavior as a soft top/bottom signal for crowded trades.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把离谱轶事、病毒式截图、车牌梗、社媒散户行为当作拥挤交易的软性顶部/底部信号。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 附图中的保时捷车牌 "THX NVDA"；推文 "IS THIS A TOP SIGNAL ?  $NVDA"；"EVERYONE ON FINTWIT NOW"；中国券商 24/7 开户、成交额纪录等散户狂热叙事。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Concentrated Rerating Book
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Build oversized positions in a few disliked names when valuation is low and narrative/sentiment is improving, aiming for multiple expansion plus earnings stabilization.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 在少数被嫌弃但估值低、叙事与情绪改善的标的上重仓，博取估值重估与基本面企稳的双击。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: "ALIBABA AND PAYPAL COMBINED ARE NOW OVER 50% OF MY PORTFOLIO"；"ITS STILL AT JUST 11 TIMES NEXT YEARS EARNINGS   NO REASON IT CANT RERATE TO 15 TIMES"。

personal_quirks.quote: I ALWAYS TWEET EXACTLY HOW I FEEL BECAUSE I DON’T CARE ABOUT LIKES OR FOLLOWERS. I’D RATHER TWEET MY EXACT THOUGHTS
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 风格上追求即时、主观、强观点表达，不做中性研报式输出。

personal_quirks.quote: FOR THOSE ASKING WHY I POST SO MUCH ABOUT ALIBABA AND PAYPAL  ALIBABA AND PAYPAL COMBINED ARE NOW OVER 50% OF MY PORTFOLIO
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 愿意做高度集中仓位，并围绕核心持仓持续输出叙事与跟踪。

personal_quirks.quote: COME ON THIS IS WAY OVERBLOWN NOW LMAO
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 当市场对单一事件反应过度时，他倾向做反身性、逆情绪判断。
喜欢用带戏谑意味的情绪极值/拥挤度线索来提示可能见顶。

personal_quirks.quote: UNPOPULAR OPINION, BUT THE COSTCO HOTDOG SUCKS
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 刻意保持逆共识语气，哪怕在非交易话题上也强化“反主流”人设。

unique_traits: 他和典型画趋势线、讲形态的 TA 交易员不同，核心优势不是几何图形识别，而是对头条新闻、宏观节奏、政治冲击和社交情绪的快速筛选与放大。附图也说明他常用的是 Google Finance 截图、新闻配图、情绪化梗图，而不是复杂指标面板。真正的 edge 更像“叙事流速 + 逆向判断 + 高传播内容包装”。
